---
title: "Zhe Zhai"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta name="description" content="Zhe Zhai (翟喆), Assistant Professor of Economics at the School of Business, Macau University of Science and Technology. Research on innovation, firm strategy, labor markets, and corporate finance.">
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 180px
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:zzhai@must.edu.mo"
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      text: Google Scholar
      href: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=3uwHZdUAAAAJ&hl=en"
    - icon: file-earmark-person
      text: CV
      href: cv.qmd
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: "https://www.linkedin.com/"
---

I am an Assistant Professor of Economics in the School of Business at the **Macau University of Science and Technology**. I received my Ph.D. in Economics from the **Georgia Institute of Technology**.

My research is in applied microeconomics, spanning **innovation and firm strategy**, **organizational behavior**, **labor economics**, **corporate finance**, **globalization**, and **environmental economics**.
